glosses.ja: 名付ける; 任命する

translations.de: Wir ernennen ihn heute zum Kapitän.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们今天任命他为队长。
translations.vi: Hôm nay chúng tôi chọn anh ấy làm đội trưởng.
translations.nl: We benoemen hem vandaag tot aanvoerder.
translations.hi: हम आज उसे कप्तान बना रहे हैं.
translations.nb: I dag utnevner vi ham til kaptein.
translations.id: Hari ini kami mengangkatnya menjadi kapten.
translations.sv: I dag utser vi honom till kapten.
translations.da: I dag udnævner vi ham til anfører.
translations.ja: 私たちは今日彼をキャプテンに任命します。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite subject pronoun (3rd person singular) used generically; subject of the verb 'nomme'.
Clitic direct-object pronoun (masculine singular) placed before the verb; direct object of 'nomme'.
Finite lexical verb, present indicative (3rd person singular) of 'nommer'; transitive, selecting a direct object and an object predicative complement.
Common noun functioning as an object predicative complement (objet attribut) that names the role assigned to the direct object.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause, indicating when the naming/appointment takes place.

sentences.target: Je veux nommer notre chat Biscotte.

translations.fr: Je veux nommer notre chat Biscotte.
translations.en: I want to name our cat Biscotte.
translations.es: Quiero llamar a nuestro gato Biscotte.
translations.de: Ich will unsere Katze Biscotte nennen.
translations.it: Voglio chiamare il nostro gatto Biscotte.
translations.ko: 나는 우리 고양이 이름을 Biscotte로 짓고 싶어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我想给我们的猫起名叫Biscotte。
translations.yue: 我想幫我哋隻貓起名做Biscotte。
translations.ru: Я хочу назвать нашего кота Biscotte.
translations.pt: Quero chamar nosso gato de Biscotte.
translations.he: אני רוצה לקרוא לחתול שלנו Biscotte.
translations.vi: Tôi muốn đặt tên con mèo của chúng tôi là Biscotte.
translations.nl: Ik wil onze kat Biscotte noemen.
translations.uk: Я хочу назвати нашого кота Biscotte.
translations.hu: El akarom nevezni a macskánkat Biscotte-nak.
translations.hi: मैं हमारी बिल्ली का नाम Biscotte रखना चाहता हूँ.
translations.el: Θέλω να ονομάσω τη γάτα μας Biscotte.
translations.nb: Jeg vil kalle katten vår Biscotte.
translations.id: Saya ingin memberi nama kucing kami Biscotte.
translations.sv: Jag vill döpa vår katt till Biscotte.
translations.ro: Vreau să numesc pisica noastră Biscotte.
translations.da: Jeg vil kalde vores kat Biscotte.
translations.ja: 私はうちの猫にBiscotteと名付けたいです。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject pronoun; subject of 'veux'.
Lexical verb, present indicative (1st person singular) of 'vouloir'; modal-like, selecting the infinitive 'nommer' as its complement.
Infinitive lexical verb functioning as complement of 'veux'; transitive, taking 'notre chat' as direct object and 'Biscotte' as an object predicative complement indicating the assigned name.
Possessive determiner (1st person plural) modifying 'chat'.
Common noun; direct object of the infinitive 'nommer'.
Proper noun; object predicative complement indicating the name assigned to 'notre chat'.

sentences.target: Vous nommez Clara responsable du projet.

translations.fr: Vous nommez Clara responsable du projet.
translations.es: Nombran a Clara responsable del proyecto.
translations.zh-Hans: 你们任命Clara为项目负责人。
translations.yue: 你哋委任Clara做項目負責人。
translations.pt: Vocês nomeiam Clara responsável pelo projeto.
translations.he: אתם ממנים את קלרה למנהלת הפרויקט.
translations.vi: Các bạn bổ nhiệm Clara làm trưởng dự án.
translations.ar: أنتم تعينون كلارا مسؤولة عن المشروع.
translations.hi: आप क्लारा को परियोजना प्रमुख नियुक्त कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Ορίζετε την Κλάρα υπεύθυνη του έργου.
translations.id: Kalian menunjuk Clara sebagai ketua proyek.
translations.ro: Voi o numiți pe Clara responsabilă de proiect.
translations.ja: あなたたちはクララをプロジェクトリーダーに任命します。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person pronoun (plural or formal singular) used as subject; subject of 'nommez'.
Finite lexical verb, present indicative (2nd person plural); transitive, selecting the direct object 'Clara' and the object predicative complement 'responsable du projet'.
Proper noun; direct object of 'nommez'.
Noun denoting a role; object predicative complement assigned to 'Clara', with a 'de' complement specifying the domain.
Preposition 'de' contracted with the definite article 'le'; introduces the complement 'projet' of 'responsable'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'du'.

sentences.target: Ils nomment Paul porte-parole du quartier.
sentences.reading: /il nɔm pɔl pɔʁt paʁɔl dy kaʁtje/

translations.fr: Ils nomment Paul porte-parole du quartier.
translations.ipa: /il nɔm pɔl pɔʁt paʁɔl dy kaʁtje/
translations.en: They're naming Paul the neighborhood spokesperson.
translations.es: Nombran a Paul portavoz del barrio.
translations.de: Sie ernennen Paul zum Sprecher des Viertels.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们任命Paul为社区发言人。
translations.yue: 佢哋委任Paul做社區發言人。
translations.pt: Eles nomeiam Paul porta-voz do bairro.
translations.he: הם ממנים את פול לדובר השכונה.
translations.vi: Họ bổ nhiệm Paul làm người phát ngôn của khu phố.
translations.ar: هم يعينون بول متحدثًا باسم الحي.
translations.nl: Zij benoemen Paul tot woordvoerder van de buurt.
translations.hu: Ők Pault nevezik ki a környék szóvivőjévé.
translations.hi: वे पॉल को मोहल्ले का प्रवक्ता नियुक्त कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Ορίζουν τον Πολ εκπρόσωπο της γειτονιάς.
translations.nb: De utnevner Paul til nabolagets talsperson.
translations.id: Mereka menunjuk Paul sebagai juru bicara lingkungan.
translations.sv: De utser Paul till kvarterets talesperson.
translations.ro: Ei îl numesc pe Paul purtător de cuvânt al cartierului.
translations.da: De udnævner Paul til kvarterets talsmand.
translations.ja: 彼らはポールを地域のスポークスパーソンに任命します。

tokens.explanation: 3rd person plural subject pronoun (masculine by default in mixed groups); subject of 'nomment'.
Finite lexical verb, present indicative (3rd person plural); transitive, selecting the direct object 'Paul' and an object predicative complement.
Proper noun; direct object of 'nomment'.
Compound common noun; object predicative complement naming the role assigned to 'Paul'.
Preposition 'de' contracted with the definite article 'le'; introduces the complement 'quartier' of 'porte-parole'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'du'.
